Bedroom.Body: Time for bed! But wait, where's your cat, Pacho? You can't go to sleep without ensuring he's okay!

Living Room.Body: The living room: the hub of the home with many possible hiding spots.

Kitchen.Body: A bag of treats sit next to the leftover pizza on the counter. Will treats help lure Pacho out?

Grab Treats.Body: You pick up the bag of treats sitting on the counter.

Front Porch.Body: You step outside and the wind immediately chills your neck. Maybe Pacho snuck out somehow?

Bathroom.Body: You remember how afraid Pacho is of the bathtub. No way he's in here.

Items.Not Useful Text: You shake the bag of treats around but nothing happens.
Items.Useful Text: You shake the bag of treats and a stray cat appears holding a ...bird in it's mouth? Oh! It's just a toy. You lay some treats down, taking the toy bird it drops as it begins feasting on the morsels.

Items.Not Useful Text: You flip a switch to make the toy bird start chirping. Hmm, nothing.
Items.Useful Text: You flip a switch to make the toy bird start chirping. Wait, there's some tousling and... Pacho climbs out from inside the chimney. It's looking like a pre-bed bath will be needed, but at the end of the day, you're relieved to have finally found him in one piece.
